title: Tricks And Traps
description: This mod is all about Trolls.
body:
**!!Reason: Haven't really liked it, it was a cool idea but I didn't like the way I executed it**

# This mod adds Blocks/Items That are fake

Support Me on KO-FI for more exclusive content! And early betas for this mod!!

Fake blocks can be walked through

- Items:
1. Fake Paste the main item of this mod
2. Meat Foods
3. Normal Foods(Bread, apple, potato,...)
- Blocks:
1. Fake Ores (compatible with iron&steelV1.0.3 and nether&end V1.0.0)
2. Fake Mineral Blocks(compatible with iron&steelV1.0.3)
3. Fake Stones
4. Fake Woods
5. Fake Barrels
6. Fake Spawner
7. Fake Bedrock
8. And Others...
9. Fake Doors (act like iron doors)
